title: Festive Cracker Crumble
description: A sweet and crunchy dessert perfect for the holiday season. Layers of graham crackers, crumble topping, and festive spices come together to create a delicious treat.
instructions: In a medium bowl, mix together crushed graham crackers and melted flaky butter until well combined.
Press the graham cracker mixture into the bottom of a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together crumble topping and spicy sugar (if using).
Spread the crumble topping mixture evenly over the graham cracker crust.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
